summary: Tested new balance calculation endpoints for historical balance bug fix. Backend APIs pass (15/15 tests). Frontend correctly displays Daily Projection dialog with backend-calculated Balance Before values for historical months.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 - minor rendering issue on initial load

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend correctly fetches backend balances via handleOpenDailyProjection() and uses them in getDailyProjectionForSelectedMonth
Backend calculation includes deposits, withdrawals, profits, and commissions correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, profit tracker, daily projection all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Balance calculation bug fix verified. New endpoints /api/profit/balance-on-date and /api/profit/daily-balances are working correctly. Frontend fetches backend-calculated balances for historical months in Daily Projection dialog. Preview environment has 40 trades across 3 months (Jan 2025, Dec 2025, Jan 2026).

features_tested.backend_api_balance_on_date: PASS - Returns correct balance for any date
features_tested.backend_api_daily_balances: PASS - Returns array of daily balances for date range
features_tested.frontend_daily_projection_dialog: PASS - Opens and displays backend-calculated balances
features_tested.frontend_balance_before_column: PASS - Shows correct values from backend
features_tested.dashboard_display: PASS - Shows Account Value, Total Profit, Total Trades correctly
features_tested.no_trade_members_widget: PASS - Shows 'All members are up to date'
features_tested.login_flow: PASS - Login works correctly with provided credentials
